name: personal-screenwriter
description: Local-first screenwriting workspace for screenplay and literary-screenplay work inside Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Use the local screenwriting workspace and writing MCP tools from Codex
interface.longDescription: Personal Screenwriter gives Codex a local screenplay and literary-screenplay workspace, plus MCP tools for opening the app, reading and writing project state, and building AI writing packets.
defaultPrompt: Open the screenwriting workspace and read the current project.
Update the project notes or writing type.
Build an AI packet for a scene rewrite pass.
